cases.prompt: Plan a new checkout experience spanning cart UI, payment authorization, order confirmation emails, and support tooling.
Break down marketplace seller integration: catalog sync, inventory updates, order ingestion, reconciliation, and operational alerting.
Turn the tenant audit-log initiative into implementable work: event capture, queryable history, retention controls, exports, and administrator UX.
Create issues for offline mobile support including local data, conflict resolution, sync visibility, analytics, and rollout safeguards.
Decompose self-service subscription management: plan changes, payment-method updates, invoices, entitlement changes, and customer-support escalation.
Correct the typo 'teh' to 'the' in README.md.
Add a unit test showing parseDate('2026-01-01') returns UTC midnight.
Change the already-approved Button.css padding from 8px to 12px and run the component test.
In UserFormatter.format, return 'Unknown user' for null input and add the regression test from issue 42.
Update lodash from 4.17.20 to 4.17.21 and run npm test.
